template.subject: Welcome to Men's Wellness Centers.
template.body: Thanks for reaching out, {{contact.first_name}}. A Men's Wellness Centers team member will call you within one business hour to schedule your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }} at your local clinic. BUILD DECISION NEEDED: paste final approved welcome copy.

Hi {{contact.first_name}}, this is Men's Wellness Centers. Thanks for reaching out. What is the best time today for a quick call to book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}? {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, following up from Men's Wellness Centers. Ready to book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}? Reply with a day that works. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, we will step back for now. When you are ready to book your consultation at Men's Wellness Centers, we are here. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
You are booked, {{contact.first_name}}. Your 60-minute in-person consultation at Men's Wellness Centers is {{appointment.start_time}}. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Good morning {{contact.first_name}}. We look forward to seeing you today at {{appointment.start_time}} for your 60-minute in-person consultation at Men's Wellness Centers.

{{contact.first_name}}, to make the most of your 60-minute in-person consultation at Men's Wellness Centers, please complete your intake form here: {{custom_values.intake_link}}. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, it means a lot to hear your visit went well. Would you share a quick review of Men's Wellness Centers? {{contact.current_review_link}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, no pressure at all. If any questions came up after your consultation at Men's Wellness Centers, I am here to help. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, we missed you today at Men's Wellness Centers. Let us get you rescheduled for your 60-minute in-person consultation. What day works? {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, your Men's Wellness Centers program renews in 7 days. Reply here to confirm and we will take care of the rest. {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
{{contact.first_name}}, how was your visit to Men's Wellness Centers? One quick tap: {{custom_values.survey_link}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}

{{contact.first_name}}, know a man who could use his edge back? Refer him to Men's Wellness Centers and we will take care of you both. {{custom_values.referral_link}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, you were referred to Men's Wellness Centers. We would love to book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }}. What day works? {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}

Sorry we missed your call to Men's Wellness Centers, {{contact.first_name}}. How can we help? You can book your {{ custom_values.consult_descriptor }} here: {{contact.current_booking_url}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, many members had the same concern about cost at first. During a visit we can walk through the options available and answer any questions.

template.subject: Your options at Men's Wellness Centers
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Many men tell us their biggest question after the consultation is cost. The good news is that our team can review different options and help you understand what works best for your situation. If you would like to continue the conversation, we would be happy to schedule another visit. {{contact.current_booking_url}}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, just checking in. If you would like to come back and review your options with the doctor, we can help you find a time that works.
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, many members had the same concern about cost at first. During a visit we can walk through the options available and answer any questions.

template.subject: Your safety is our priority
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Some members leave their first consultation with questions about safety. Our treatments are physician supervised and based on FDA approved therapies. During a visit the doctor will review your health history and answer every question you may have. If you would like to continue the conversation, we would be glad to see you again. {{contact.current_booking_url}}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, many members have safety questions at first. Our doctors take time to explain everything during the visit so you can make a comfortable decision.

template.subject: Questions are always welcome
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, It is completely normal to have questions before starting any treatment. Our physicians are here to explain the process, review your health history, and make sure you feel comfortable with every step. If you would like to speak with us again, you can schedule a visit here. {{contact.current_booking_url}}

Hi {{contact.first_name}}, it is very common for members to want to talk with their partner before making a decision. You are welcome to bring them to the clinic so both of you can ask questions.

template.subject: You can bring your partner to the visit
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Many members choose to bring their partner to the consultation so everyone can hear the information together and ask questions. If that would help you feel more comfortable, we would be happy to schedule a visit for both of you. {{contact.current_booking_url}}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, if you and your partner would like to visit the clinic together, we can help you find a convenient time.

template.subject: A quick note from Men's Wellness Centers
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, We understand that timing is not always right. Many men start with a simple consultation to learn what might be causing their symptoms and what options exist. Whenever you feel ready, our team will be here to help. {{contact.current_booking_url}}
Hi {{contact.first_name}}, just checking in. If you ever want to revisit the conversation about your health, we are here whenever the timing feels right.

template.subject: Whenever you are ready
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Your health does not have to be rushed. When you feel ready to take the next step, our physicians are here to help you understand what may be going on and what can be done. You can schedule a visit anytime here. {{contact.current_booking_url}}

template.subject: A quick health check can answer a lot
template.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, Many men notice changes in energy, focus, or overall wellness as they get older. A consultation with our physician can help identify what might be going on and what options may help. You can schedule a visit anytime here. {{contact.current_booking_url}} {{ custom_values.sms_opt_out_footer }}
Hi {{contact.first_name}},if you ever want to come in for a consultation, our team would be happy to help you schedule a time.
